zh.lifeSummary: 當Marion Meek於大約1612年出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波時，她的父親Johne Meik34歲，母親Geills Stevinsone29歲。她於1630年9月23日與David Thompson在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marion Meek于大约1612年出生在苏格兰艾丁波时，她的父亲Johne Meik34岁，母亲Geills Stevinsone29岁。她于1630年9月23日与David Thompson在英国苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Meek
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for a self-effacing person or a gentle and compassionate one, from Middle English meke ‘humble, meek’ (Old Norse mjúkr ‘soft, pliant, gentle’).
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farms so named in Møre og Romsdal, in Old Norse a compound of mith ‘in the middle’ and vík ‘bay’.
Dutch: metonymic occupational name for a baker, from Middle Dutch micke ‘bread’.

variants.name: Meeks
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of Meek , with post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Mix .
History: Thomas Meeks (born c. 1624 in London) emigrated to New Haven, CT, in or before 1643. In 17th-century New Haven this surname was also spelled Meekes, Mix, and Mixx.

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Marion Meek was born about 1612, in Edinburgh, Scotland, her father, Johne Meik, was 34 and her mother, Geills Stevinsone, was 29. She married David Thompson on 23 September 1630, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marion Meek est née environ 1612, à Edinburgh, Écosse, son père, Johne Meik, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Geills Stevinsone, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé David Thompson le 23 septembre 1630, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marion Meek um 1612 in Edinburgh, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Johne Meik 34 und ihre Mutter Geills Stevinsone 29. Sie hat am 23. September 1630 in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom David Thompson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marion Meek è nata il circa 1612 nel Edinburgh, Scotland, sua padre, Johne Meik, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Geills Stevinsone, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato David Thompson il 23 settembre 1630, nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Marion Meekが約1612年にスコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父Johne Meikは34歳，母Geills Stevinsoneは29歳であった。1630年9月23日にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグでDavid Thompsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Marion Meek(이)가 대략 1612년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johne Meik(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Geills Stevinsone(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1630년 9월 23일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 David Thompson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marion Meek nasceu aproximadamente 1612, em Edinburgh, Scotland, seu pai, Johne Meik, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Geills Stevinsone, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com David Thompson em 23 de setembro de 1630, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marion Meek родилась около 1612 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Johne Meik было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Geills Stevinsone, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Thompson 23 сентября 1630 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marion Meek nació aproximadamente 1612, en Edinburgh, Scotland, su papá, Johne Meik, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Geills Stevinsone, tenía 29 años. Se casó con David Thompson el 23 de septiembre de 1630, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas.
